1 = Rarely

459 CNDCT_MENTL_STUS_DSCHRG_CD CNDCT_MENTL_STUS_DSCHRG_CD Brief Interview - Mental Status (BIMS) (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the facility felt a brief mental status interview should be conducted. 0 = No (patient is rarely/never understood)
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No
